nasb.text: God also said to him, “I am God Almighty; Be fruitful and multiply; A nation and a company of nations shall come from you, And kings shall come forth from you.

esv.text: And God said to him, “I am God Almighty: be fruitful and multiply. A nation and a company of nations shall come from you, and kings shall come from your own body.

cnv.text: 神對他說： “我是全能的　神， 你要繁衍增多， 必有一國和眾國從你而生， 又必有很多君王從你而出。

ccb.text: 上帝又说：“我是全能的上帝，你要生养众多，一国，甚至多国必从你而出，许多君王必出自你的子孙。

csbs.text: 神又对他说： “我是全能的神； 你要繁衍增多； 必有一国和众邦之国从你而来， 众君王也必从你生出。
